releaseCandidateCommit: the RC commits following 32ba7ef on structured-family-editors-unified (see git log)
releaseScope: release candidate: runtime-first live preview and gated single-write persistence for the v0.55.2 data/model, zero-drift audited against Hyprland 0.55.4
builderBoundaries: refuses when Cargo.toml version is not 0.2.0-rc.1
refuses to overwrite an existing dist/v0.2.0-rc.1
never creates or moves tags, never pushes, never publishes
never runs hyprctl and never touches the Hyprland session or config

sourceArchive.builtFrom: git archive HEAD at the RC commit

checksumFile.note: authoritative checksums live in this file, not in the committed manifest: the source archive is built from the commit containing the manifest, so embedded checksums could never match themselves
